prestazioni: Cosworth-developed 6.5L naturally aspirated V12 (engine code: AM-RB 001) with a bespoke dry-sump lubrication system, upgraded to 1,175 HP via a custom Cosworth Pectel SQ6M ECU remap, optimized for 10,500 RPM redline with titanium intake valves and sodium-filled exhaust valves from Del West Engineering

Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapović with 4-into-2-into-1 collector design, 100mm carbon-fiber exit pipes, and electronically controlled butterfly valves for active sound modulation (20% louder in Track mode)

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), paired with a bespoke carbon-fiber monocoque subframe reinforcement kit by Multimatic, reducing chassis flex by 18% under lateral G-forces
estetica: Full carbon-fiber aero package by Aston Martin Racing (AMR), including a 20% larger front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via cockpit switch), a rear diffuser with 12 vertical strakes, and a fixed rear wing with DRS-style active angle adjustment (up to 15 degrees)

Bespoke BBS FI-R 21-inch forged magnesium wheels (9.5x21 front, 13x21 rear) with titanium wheel bolts and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 front, 355/25 rear), wrapped in a custom 'AMR Pro Evo' livery with 3M Matte Graphite vinyl over raw carbon fiber

Lightweight polycarbonate rear window with integrated titanium roll cage by Sabelt, featuring a 3D-printed titanium air extraction vent (reducing cabin pressure by 12% at 200 mph) and a carbon-fiber rearview camera housing by Pro Alloy Motorsports
